achievements.description: Collect all Power Stars

achievements.description: Buy every item in the shop

achievements.title: These tiles flip me off
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Flipping the Tiles' while stepping on every possible platform and without taking any damage or stepping on a platform twice
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Less scary than you think
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Scary Block Staircase' without using the switch

achievements.title: Bird Up!
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Catch the Quetzacoatl' without using the wing cap and without any Pokemon

achievements.title: Exploration takes time
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Explore the Wreck' without using the A button
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: So Close, Yet So Far Away
achievements.description: Collect the star 'The Gold Stash' without using any Pokemon
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: You are more a clown than a pirate
achievements.description: Defeat the Bob-Omb Pirate without taking any damage
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Too Scared of the Water
achievements.description: Activate the Switch in 'Babylon' without touching any water
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Red Coins Little Parkour
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Reds on the Docks' without touching any water and don't use any Pokemon or collect any yellow coins on your way
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: You're just a Cumulus Cloud
achievements.description: Defeat Huff N. Puff without taking any damage
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Putting these dirty shoes to good use
achievements.description: Step on the heads of all 3 golden Cleopatra Statues without using Weezing
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Everything for You, My Queen
achievements.description: Listen to all of Cleopatra's complaints
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Little Mummy calls for her Mommy
achievements.description: Defeat the old Pharaoh without taking any damage
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Donkey Kong: Statue Climber
achievements.description: Get on top of Donkey Kongs Statue and grab the star without using the canon
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Toxic Waste
achievements.description: Collect the star 'The Sewer Secret' by going through the intended way and without touching any of the toxic water or using any Pokemon
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Even on water you are slow
achievements.description: Beat Hunter the Koopa in 20 seconds or less

achievements.description: Collect the star 'Tiki-Guy Totempole' without using the A button

achievements.description: Satisfy the Tiki Heads and collect the star without talking to any of them

achievements.title: They should have made you out of stone
achievements.description: Defeat the Tiki Totem without taking any damage

achievements.description: Get inside the Tower Trooper's Tower without using the A button or using any Pokemon

achievements.title: The Longest and Most Dangerous Slide
achievements.description: Collect the star 'The Longest Slide' without falling down the slide

achievements.description: Collect the star 'Awaken the Dragon!' while not standing on a dragon for more than 3 seconds

achievements.title: Just a lame Koopa in disguise
achievements.description: Defeat the Tower Trooper without taking any damage

achievements.description: Collect the star 'The Sunken Nautilus' without using the A button

achievements.description: Step on top of the helm of the golden Peach Statue

achievements.description: Collect the star 'Greek's Reds' while collecting all 8 red coins at once

achievements.title: No Wonder you are Player Number 2

achievements.description: Defeat Zeus without taking any damage

achievements.description: Use every warp in 'Planet Namek' without leaving the Course

achievements.description: Find a Secret Star in 'Dandyworld' and collect it
